_description: This configuration file defines which tasks to run during the nightly build process

enabled_tasks.name: system-health
enabled_tasks.description: Check system disk space and health metrics

_task_template.name: task-module-name
_task_template.description: Human-readable description of what this task does

git_summary_example.name: git-summary
git_summary_example.description: Generate summary of Git repository changes

cleanup_example.description: Clean up temporary files older than 7 days
